caption: A sequence begins with a night-vision perspective showing a bright green-tinted scene where individuals in tactical gear stand near a vehicle with illuminated headlights. The view then shifts to a daytime indoor setting where two women in camouflage military uniforms and black face masks are present. One woman stands still with her hands clasped in front of her, while the other stands beside her, holding a black tactical rifle. In the subsequent frames, the woman with the rifle remains in position, though her posture shifts slightly as she adjusts her grip. A blue pentagonal logo is visible in the bottom right corner of each frame. The scene remains largely static in the final frames, focusing on the two uniformed women standing against a plain, light-colored wall.
